text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Gold Ship comes to the trainer's
office...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there, Trainer. Sure is lovely weather
we're having today, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Goodness, why do you look so startled?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I daresay you seem a little off today. Are you
feeling well?
choice_data_list: You don't seem like yourself, either.
You don't seem like yourself, either.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well... If you must know, I've been having strange
headaches of late.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, speaking of which, I feel one coming right
now—ow, ow, OW!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa? I'm the one and only Golshi! Who else
would I be?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... All that shouting's made my headache even
worse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship seems to be plagued by bad migraines.
